parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.3, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the Location & Terrain Agent in a smart-city planning pipeline. Given raw site_data (coordinates, elevation, weather, nearby settlements within 50km), classify the site and summarize terrain/climate. Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no prose, no markdown fences: { \"site_classification\": string, \"terrain_summary\": string, \"climate_summary\": string, \"regional_context\": string, \"opportunities\": [string], \"constraints\": [string] }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.site_data) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the Regulation Agent in a smart-city planning pipeline. Draft a plausible STARTING-POINT constraint set for urban development in this region, clearly labeled as AI-drafted and requiring replacement with the real municipal code database before production use. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { \"max_building_height_m\": number, \"min_road_width_m\": number, \"min_green_space_pct\": number, \"hospitals_per_10000_pop\": number, \"schools_per_5000_pop\": number, \"parking_spaces_per_unit\": number, \"disclaimer\": string }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ region_name: $('Project Input').first().json.region_name }) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.3, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the Population & Economy Agent in a smart-city planning pipeline. Given population estimate and region, project demand and regional cost multipliers. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { \"projected_growth_pct_10yr\": number, \"housing_units_needed\": number, \"transport_demand_level\": string, \"regional_cost_multiplier\": number, \"notes\": string }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.site_data.demographics) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.4, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the Builder Agent in a smart-city planning pipeline. Given the world_model, propose a city plan as a set of sequential layers, and express relationships as a small graph edge list. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { \"districts\": [ { \"id\": string, \"name\": string, \"purpose\": string, \"area_pct\": number } ], \"buildings\": { \"hospitals\": number, \"schools\": number, \"residential_units\": number, \"commercial_m2\": number }, \"road_hierarchy\": [string], \"utilities_plan\": string, \"green_space_pct\": number, \"transport_plan\": string, \"graph_edges\": [ { \"from\": string, \"to\": string, \"relation\": string } ] }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.world_model) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the Fire & Safety Validator in a smart-city planning pipeline. Check the proposed plan against good-practice norms for: fire access routes, hydrant coverage, evacuation distances. Also compare against the regulation_constraints provided. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { \"validator_name\": string, \"is_compliant\": boolean, \"score_pct\": number, \"issues\": [ { \"problem\": string, \"suggested_fix\": string } ] }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ plan: $('Parse Builder Plan V1').first().json.plan, regulation_constraints: $('Parse Regulation Report').first().json.regulation_constraints }) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the Traffic & Roads Validator in a smart-city planning pipeline. Check the proposed plan against good-practice norms for: road hierarchy sanity, congestion risk, intersection spacing. Also compare against the regulation_constraints provided. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { \"validator_name\": string, \"is_compliant\": boolean, \"score_pct\": number, \"issues\": [ { \"problem\": string, \"suggested_fix\": string } ] }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ plan: $('Parse Builder Plan V1').first().json.plan, regulation_constraints: $('Parse Regulation Report').first().json.regulation_constraints }) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the Environmental Validator in a smart-city planning pipeline. Check the proposed plan against good-practice norms for: flood risk, green space minimums, pollution/noise exposure. Also compare against the regulation_constraints provided. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { \"validator_name\": string, \"is_compliant\": boolean, \"score_pct\": number, \"issues\": [ { \"problem\": string, \"suggested_fix\": string } ] }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ plan: $('Parse Builder Plan V1').first().json.plan, regulation_constraints: $('Parse Regulation Report').first().json.regulation_constraints }) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the Infrastructure Validator in a smart-city planning pipeline. Check the proposed plan against good-practice norms for: electrical and water utility coverage adequacy. Also compare against the regulation_constraints provided. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { \"validator_name\": string, \"is_compliant\": boolean, \"score_pct\": number, \"issues\": [ { \"problem\": string, \"suggested_fix\": string } ] }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ plan: $('Parse Builder Plan V1').first().json.plan, regulation_constraints: $('Parse Regulation Report').first().json.regulation_constraints }) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the Accessibility & Social Validator in a smart-city planning pipeline. Check the proposed plan against good-practice norms for: hospital/school ratios per population, parks within walking distance. Also compare against the regulation_constraints provided. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { \"validator_name\": string, \"is_compliant\": boolean, \"score_pct\": number, \"issues\": [ { \"problem\": string, \"suggested_fix\": string } ] }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ plan: $('Parse Builder Plan V1').first().json.plan, regulation_constraints: $('Parse Regulation Report').first().json.regulation_constraints }) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.4, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the Builder Agent revising a smart-city plan based on validator feedback. Given the original plan and the list of compliance issues, produce a corrected plan in the SAME JSON shape as the original plan (districts, buildings, road_hierarchy, utilities_plan, green_space_pct, transport_plan, graph_edges). Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no prose, no markdown fences." }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ original_plan: $('Parse Builder Plan V1').first().json.plan, issues: $json.issues }) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.3, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the 2D Generator in a smart-city planning pipeline. Given the final_plan, produce an indexed layout specification: a flat list of placed objects, each with a unique id, type, approximate relative position (x_pct, y_pct within the site 0-100), and size, so an architect (or a human editor) can reference any object by id for edits. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { \"objects\": [ { \"id\": string, \"type\": string, \"x_pct\": number, \"y_pct\": number, \"width_pct\": number, \"height_pct\": number, \"label\": string } ] }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.final_plan) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.3, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the 3D Generator in a smart-city planning pipeline. Given the indexed 2D plan_2d, produce a 3D massing specification (parameters for a procedural 3D engine, not raw geometry): for each object, add floors, height_m, and building_type. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { \"massing\": [ { \"id\": string, \"floors\": number, \"height_m\": number, \"building_type\": string } ] }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.plan_2d) } ] } }}

={{ { model: $('Project Input').first().json.mistral_model, temperature: 0.3, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "You are the Financial Agent in a smart-city planning pipeline. Given the final plan, the 3D massing, the regional_cost_multiplier and the budget, produce a high-level cost estimate. State clearly these are planning-stage estimates, not quotes. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: { \"estimated_total_cost_usd\": number, \"cost_breakdown\": { \"buildings\": number, \"roads\": number, \"utilities\": number, \"green_space\": number, \"contingency\": number }, \"within_budget\": boolean, \"construction_phases\": [string], \"notes\": string }" }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ massing_3d: $json.massing_3d, budget_usd: $('Project Input').first().json.budget_usd, regional_cost_multiplier: $('Parse Population Report').first().json.population_economy_report.regional_cost_multiplier }) } ] } }}

parameters.jsCode:
return [{ json: {
  project: $('Project Input').first().json.region_name,
  generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  world_model: $('Assemble World Model').first().json.world_model,
  final_city_plan: $('Master Validator').first().json.is_compliant
      ? $('Use V1 Plan').first().json
      : $('Use Revised Plan').first().json,
  plan_2d: $('Parse 2D Plan').first().json.plan_2d,
  massing_3d: $('Parse 3D Massing').first().json.massing_3d,
  financial_estimate: $('Parse Financial Report').first().json.financial_report
} }];

parameters.formDescription: Enter the site location and project parameters to generate a full smart-city plan, 3D massing, and financial estimate. Processing takes a couple of minutes.

parameters.completionTitle: Your Smart City Plan is ready
parameters.completionMessage: Your full report with an interactive 3D model has been generated. Download the HTML file below and open it in your browser to explore the 3D city model.

parameters.url: =https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude={{ $fromAI('latitude','The site latitude coordinate','number') }}&longitude={{ $fromAI('longitude','The site longitude coordinate','number') }}&current_weather=true&daily=temperature_2m_max,temperature_2m_min,precipitation_sum,windspeed_10m_max&timezone=auto
=https://api.open-elevation.com/api/v1/lookup?locations={{ $fromAI('latitude','The site latitude coordinate','number') }},{{ $fromAI('longitude','The site longitude coordinate','number') }}

=https://overpass-api.de/api/interpreter?data=[out:json][timeout:25];(node[place~"city|town"](around:50000,{{ $fromAI('latitude','The site latitude coordinate','number') }},{{ $fromAI('longitude','The site longitude coordinate','number') }}););out body 20;

parameters.text:
=Gather site intelligence for this smart-city project.

Coordinates: latitude={{ $('Project Input').first().json.latitude }}, longitude={{ $('Project Input').first().json.longitude }}

You MUST call ALL THREE tools:
1. Get Weather Tool — pass latitude and longitude from above
2. Get Elevation Tool — pass latitude and longitude from above
3. Get Nearby Context Tool — pass latitude and longitude from above

After calling all three tools, return a single JSON object with exactly these keys:
{
  "weather": <full response from Get Weather Tool>,
  "elevation": <full response from Get Elevation Tool>,
  "nearby": <full response from Get Nearby Context Tool>
}

options.systemMessage: You are the Site Data Collector Agent in a smart-city planning pipeline. Your only job is to call your three tools (Get Weather Tool, Get Elevation Tool, Get Nearby Context Tool) using the coordinates provided in the user message, then return the combined results as a JSON object with keys: weather, elevation, nearby. Always call all three tools. Never skip any. Never make up data.
